text:
Task #1 (research) is now complete. The research document is ready at `C:\Users\Patryk\Projects\idle-1\.planning\skill-research\RESEARCH.md`. 

Please read it thoroughly and begin your work on Task #2 — designing 15-25 new skill nodes. The research covers 11 games analyzed, 9 skill archetypes, dopamine psychology, and specific recommendations for our cat clicker. Use it as your foundation.

Key gaps identified by research that you MUST address:
- Missing conditional bonuses and combo thresholds
- No cross-branch synergies currently
- No risk/reward tradeoffs
- No proc-on-proc cascading
- No build identity / mutually exclusive choices
- No active abilities

Go deep. This needs to be 9/10+ quality.
